text:
was a former soldier of the Scout Regiment who defected to join a group of rebels under Eren Jaeger.

Appearance

Oliver was a man of average height with short blond hair that he kept styled in an undercut. He had a thin beard.

Story

War for Paradis arc

Oliver accompanies Floch Forster to retrieve Zeke Jaeger from Levi Ackermann and the soldiers guarding him. En route to their location, Floch hears a sound resembling thunder near the edge of the forest. They go to investigate and find a completely destroyed wagon, along with an injured Levi lying on the bank of a river. Hange Zoë flees with Levi's body and Oliver is one of the soldiers who chase after the two. Oliver is killed by Hange later on.

People killed

Failed attempts

Hange Zoë
Levi Ackermann

Trivia

The name "Oliver" is derived from the Latin "olivarius," meaning "olive tree planter."
